creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
(In reply to Greg V from comment #14)
I'm saying that yesterday's commit of the update of Abiword to 3.0.4 does not compile on 12.2-RELEASE-p2.

What I don't understand is why the patch of Walter Schwarzenfeld of 2020-01-27 isn't committed, because that one works. I'm running Abiword 3.0.4 based on his patch for quite some time now.
